---
id: v-2-units-tenancy-put
title: "Assign primary user"
description: "Addressed by the unit's KISS `unit_id` (ULID). Set the unit's single primary user (the owner). Marks the unit occupied, sets the move-in date, clears any lockout, and (with a `tenant` block) creates or updates that user so they can claim the unit in the app. If the unit already has a primary user, this REPLACES them — the prior primary link is overwritten (guest / secondary accessors are left attached). Adding a guest is a separate flow, not this endpoint."
sidebar_label: "Assign primary user"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: reference/kiss-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Assign primary user"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/units/{ulid}/tenancy"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Addressed by the unit's KISS `unit_id` (ULID). Set the unit's single primary user (the owner). Marks the unit occupied, sets the move-in date, clears any lockout, and (with a `tenant` block) creates or updates that user so they can claim the unit in the app. If the unit already has a primary user, this REPLACES them — the prior primary link is overwritten (guest / secondary accessors are left attached). Adding a guest is a separate flow, not this endpoint.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
